gauge.name: Sabine River near Gladewater

impacts.statement: U.S. Highway 80 will be flooded and closed. Several thousand acres of land will remain flooded for several days.
The approaches to U.S. Highway 271 floods at the Sabine River bridge.  Expect major flooding to continue for several more days.
Expect moderate to severe flooding with some secondary roadways near the river to be closed. Also homes will be threatened with flooding and preparations should be completed for a major flood.
Lowland flooding will continue to slowly decrease over the next several days.
Expect lowland flooding to continue with oil field operations curtailed.
Expect minor lowland flooding with camps and picnic areas near the river suffering some flooding.

dataAttribution.text: USGS--Water Resources of the United States
dataAttribution.title: US Geological Survey
Observations courtesy of U.S. Geological Survey

hydronotes.statement: River forecasts for this location take into account past precipitation and the precipitation amounts expected approximately 24 hours into the future from the forecast issuance time.

gauge.forecastReliability: Forecasts are issued as needed during times of high water, but are not routinely available.
